info.title: Sim API
info.description: The Sim API by Dune provides real-time blockchain data across EVM and SVM chains. Access token balances, transaction history, on-chain activity, DeFi positions, NFT collectibles, token information, and webhook subscriptions through a unified REST API.

tags.name: subscriptions
tags.description: Webhook subscription management for real-time on-chain event notifications.

get.summary: Get EVM activity for a given address
get.description: This endpoint provides a real-time feed of on-chain activity for any EVM address. Activity is returned in chronological order (newest first) and includes native token transfers, ERC20 token transfers with metadata, ERC721 (NFT) transfers with token IDs, and contract interactions with decoded function calls.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Wallet address to get activity for

parameters.name: chain_ids
parameters.description: Filter by chain(s). Accepts numeric chain IDs and/or tags. Provide a single value (e.g. `?chain_ids=1` or `?chain_ids=mainnet`) or a comma-separated list (e.g. `?chain_ids=1,8543,testnet`). Chain names are not accepted. If this query parameter is omitted, results include activity from chains with the `default` tag. See the [Supported Chains Tags](/evm/supported-chains#tags) section.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The offset to paginate through result sets. This is a cursor being passed from the previous response, only use what the backend returns here.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of activity items to return. Default is 20 when not provided. Values above 100 are reduced to 100.

parameters.name: token_address
parameters.description: Filter activities by token contract address. Provide a single address (e.g. `?token_address=0xa0b8...`) or a comma-separated list (e.g. `?token_address=0xa0b8...,0xdac1...`). Only activities involving the specified token(s) will be returned. Swap and call activities are excluded when this filter is set, as they do not have a single token address. Native transfers are also excluded since they have no token contract.

parameters.name: activity_type
parameters.description: Filter activities by type. Provide a single value (e.g. `?activity_type=send`) or a comma-separated list (e.g. `?activity_type=send,receive`). Only activities matching one of the specified types will be returned.

parameters.name: asset_type
parameters.description: Filter activities by asset standard. Provide a single value (e.g. `?asset_type=native`) or a comma-separated list (e.g. `?asset_type=erc20,erc721`). Use `native` to include native token transfers (e.g. ETH). Contract call activities have no asset type and are excluded when this filter is set.

with_warnings.summary: Response with unsupported chain IDs warning

warnings.message: Some requested chain_ids are not supported. Activity is returned only for supported chains.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid address or validation error.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key.

value.error: invalid API Key

429.description: Rate Limit Exceeded - Too many requests.

value.error: Too many requests. Please contact sales@dune.com to increase your limit.

get.summary: Get EVM token balances for a given address
get.description: This endpoint returns EVM token balances for an address for any token that the address has interacted with

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Wallet address to get balances for

parameters.name: chain_ids
parameters.description: Filter by chain(s). Accepts numeric chain IDs and/or tags. Provide a single value (e.g. `?chain_ids=1` or `?chain_ids=mainnet`) or a comma-separated list (e.g. `?chain_ids=1,8543,testnet`). Chain names are not accepted. If this query parameter is omitted, results include balances from chains with the `default` tag. See the [Supported Chains Tags](/evm/supported-chains#tags) section.

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: Specify `erc20` or `native` to get only ERC20 tokens or native assets, respectively

parameters.name: asset_class
parameters.description: Filter by asset class. Use `stablecoin` to return only stablecoin balances. This is equivalent to using the `/stablecoins` endpoint.

parameters.name: metadata
parameters.description: A comma separated list of additional metadata fields to include for each token. Supported values: `logo`, `url`, `pools`

parameters.name: exclude_spam_tokens
parameters.description: When true, excludes tokens with less than 100 USD liquidity from the response. This differs from the `low_liquidity` field in the response.

parameters.name: exclude_unpriced
parameters.description: When true, excludes balances for tokens without available pricing data. By default, unpriced token balances are included.

parameters.name: historical_prices
parameters.description: Historical price selection. Provide a single integer or a comma-separated list of up to 3 integers representing hours in the past (e.g. `168` for 1 week ago or `720,168,24` for 1 month, 1 week, and 1 day ago). When set, each balance includes a historical_prices array with one entry per offset.

three_offsets.summary: Three offsets (1 month, 1 week, 1 day ago)

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The offset to paginate through result sets. This is a cursor being passed from the previous response, only use what the backend returns here.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of balances to return. Default is 1000 when not provided. Values above 1000 are reduced to 1000.

with_warnings.summary: Response with unsupported chain IDs warning

warnings.message: Some requested chain_ids are not supported. Balances are returned only for supported chains.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid wallet address or invalid query parameter.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key.

value.error: invalid API Key

429.description: Rate Limit Exceeded - Too many requests.

value.error: Too many requests. Please contact sales@dune.com to increase your limit.

503.description: Service Unavailable - The balances service is temporarily in a retry state. Retry the request after a short delay.

get.summary: Get a single token balance for a given address
get.description: Returns the balance for a specific token (or native asset) for a wallet on a single specified chain. This sub-endpoint reuses the Balances response format.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Wallet address to get the token balance for

parameters.name: token_address
parameters.description: Token contract address or `native` for the chain's native asset

parameters.name: chain_ids
parameters.description: Filter by chain(s). Accepts numeric chain IDs and/or tags. Provide a single value (e.g. `?chain_ids=1`) or a comma-separated list (e.g. `?chain_ids=1,8543,testnet`). Chain names are not accepted. If omitted, results include balances from chains with the "default" tag for the address. See the [Supported Chains Tags](/evm/supported-chains#tags) section.

parameters.name: metadata
parameters.description: A comma separated list of additional metadata fields to include for each token. Supported values: `logo`, `url`, `pools`

parameters.name: historical_prices
parameters.description: Historical price selection. Provide a single integer or a comma-separated list of up to 3 integers representing hours in the past (e.g. `168` for 1 week ago or `720,168,24` for 1 month, 1 week, and 1 day ago). When set, each balance includes a historical_prices array with one entry per offset.

three_offsets.summary: Three offsets (1 month, 1 week, 1 day ago)

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid wallet address or invalid query parameter.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key.

value.error: invalid API Key

429.description: Rate Limit Exceeded - Too many requests.

value.error: Too many requests. Please contact sales@dune.com to increase your limit.

503.description: Service Unavailable - The balances service is temporarily in a retry state. Retry the request after a short delay.

get.description: Retrieves a list of EVM compatible collectibles (NFTs) for a given wallet address.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: The wallet address to get collectibles for.

parameters.name: chain_ids
parameters.description: Filter by chain(s). Accepts numeric chain IDs and/or tags. Provide a single value (e.g. `?chain_ids=1` or `?chain_ids=mainnet`) or a comma-separated list (e.g. `?chain_ids=1,8543,testnet`). Chain names are not accepted. If this query parameter is omitted, results include collectibles from chains with the `default` tag. See the [Supported Chains Tags](/evm/supported-chains#tags) section.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Pagination cursor. Use the `next_offset` value from the previous response to get the next page. Omit to fetch the first page.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum entries per page for collectibles. Default is 250 when not provided. Values above 2500 are reduced to 2500. If fewer entries exist than the limit, only the available entries are returned.

parameters.name: filter_spam
parameters.description: When true, hide collectibles identified as spam. Set to false to return all collectibles, including potential spam. See the [Spam Filtering](#spam-filtering) section for more details.

parameters.name: show_spam_scores
parameters.description: When true, include spam scoring details (`spam_score` and `explanations`) to explain filtering decisions.

200.description: A list of collectibles for the specified address.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid address or validation error.

value.error: Invalid address format

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key.

value.error: invalid API Key

404.description: Not Found - The requested chain is not supported.

value.error: Chain not supported: 999999

429.description: Rate Limit Exceeded - Too many requests.

value.error: Too many requests. Please contact sales@dune.com to increase your limit.
Failed to bootstrap

get.summary: Get DeFi positions for an address
get.description: Returns a wallet's DeFi positions including USD values, position-specific metadata, and aggregation summaries across supported protocols.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Wallet address to inspect for DeFi positions.

parameters.name: chain_ids
parameters.description: Filter by chain(s). Accepts numeric chain IDs and/or tags. Provide a single value (e.g. `?chain_ids=1` or `?chain_ids=mainnet`) or a comma-separated list (e.g. `?chain_ids=1,8453,testnet`). Chain names are not accepted. If this query parameter is omitted, results include positions from chains with the `default` tag. See the [Supported Chains Tags](/evm/supported-chains#tags) section.

value.error: Invalid user address

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key.

value.error: invalid API Key

429.description: Rate Limit Exceeded - Too many requests.

value.error: Too many requests. Please contact sales@dune.com to increase your limit.
Internal error: unexpected failure

get.summary: Get stablecoin balances for a given address
get.description: This endpoint returns stablecoin balances for an address across supported EVM chains. It filters the standard balances response to include only configured stablecoins (USD-pegged, yield-bearing, and euro-pegged).

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Wallet address to get stablecoin balances for

parameters.name: chain_ids
parameters.description: Filter by chain(s). Accepts numeric chain IDs and/or tags. Provide a single value (e.g. `?chain_ids=1` or `?chain_ids=mainnet`) or a comma-separated list (e.g. `?chain_ids=1,8453,137`). If omitted, results include balances from chains with the `default` tag. See the [Supported Chains Tags](/evm/supported-chains#tags) section.

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: Specify `erc20` or `native` to get only ERC20 stablecoins or native stablecoins (e.g., xDAI on Gnosis), respectively

parameters.name: metadata
parameters.description: A comma separated list of additional metadata fields to include for each token. Supported values: `logo`, `url`, `pools`

parameters.name: exclude_spam_tokens
parameters.description: When true, excludes tokens with less than 100 USD liquidity from the response. This differs from the `low_liquidity` field in the response.

parameters.name: exclude_unpriced
parameters.description: When true, excludes balances for tokens without available pricing data. By default, unpriced token balances are included.

parameters.name: historical_prices
parameters.description: Historical price selection. Provide a single integer or a comma-separated list of up to 3 integers representing hours in the past (e.g. `168` for 1 week ago or `720,168,24` for 1 month, 1 week, and 1 day ago). When set, each balance includes a historical_prices array with one entry per offset.

three_offsets.summary: Three offsets (1 month, 1 week, 1 day ago)

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The offset to paginate through result sets. This is a cursor being passed from the previous response, only use what the backend returns here.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of balances to return. Default is 1000 when not provided. Values above 1000 are reduced to 1000.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key.

value.error: invalid API Key

get.summary: Get a list of supported chains for EVM endpoints
get.description: This endpoint returns a list of chains that are supported by the EVM endpoints. This is a unified endpoint that replaces the individual chains endpoints for each service.

400.description: Bad Request - The request could not be understood by the server due to malformed data

429.description: Rate Limit Exceeded - Too many requests.

value.error: Too many requests. Please contact sales@dune.com to increase your limit.

500.description: Internal Server Error - A generic error occurred on the server

get.description: Retrieves a list of token holders for a given token contract address on a specified blockchain.

parameters.name: chain_id
parameters.description: The chain id of the blockchain (e.g., 8453 for Base). For a full list see [Supported Chains](/evm/supported-chains).

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: The token contract address.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of token holders to return. Default is 500 when not provided. Values above 500 are reduced to 500.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Pagination token from the previous response's next_offset field.

200.description: A list of token holders for the specified token address on the specified chain.

error.message: Verify the address format and other parameters in your request

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key.

value.error: invalid API Key

429.description: Rate Limit Exceeded - Too many requests.

value.error: Too many requests. Please contact sales@dune.com to increase your limit.

get.summary: Get EVM token information for a specified contract address (or the native token), on any chain.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: The contract address of the token or 'native' for the native token of the chain

parameters.name: chain_ids
parameters.description: Specify exactly one chain. Accepts a single numeric chain ID (e.g. `?chain_ids=1`). Chain names are not accepted. See the [Supported Chains Tags](/evm/supported-chains#tags) section.

parameters.name: historical_prices
parameters.description: Request historical point-in-time prices. Provide a single integer or a comma-separated list of up to 3 integers representing hours in the past (e.g. `168` for 1 week ago or `720,168,24` for 1 month, 1 week, and 1 day ago). When present, each token includes a historical_prices array with one entry per offset.

three_offsets.summary: Three offsets (1 month, 1 week, 1 day ago)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: This endpoint returns up to the number of supported chains. See [Supported Chains](/evm/supported-chains) to learn more.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The offset to paginate through result sets; this is a cursor being passed from the previous response, only use what the backend returns here

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid address, chain ID, token ID, or batch size exceeded.

invalidAddress.value: Invalid address: expected a hex-encoded address

batchSizeExceeded.value: Batch size exceeds maximum limit of 100 tokens

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key.

value.error: invalid API Key

404.description: Not Found - Token or resource not found.

429.description: Rate Limit Exceeded - Too many requests.

value.error: Too many requests. Please contact sales@dune.com to increase your limit.

storeError.value: Failed to read from store: connection timeout

get.description: Returns metadata and pricing information for a specific EVM token. Includes token name, symbol, decimals, current price in USD, and optionally historical price data when the `historical_prices` parameter is set.
Get transactions for a given EVM address

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: EVM wallet address

parameters.name: chain_ids
parameters.description: Filter by chain(s). Accepts numeric chain IDs and/or tags. Provide a single value (e.g. `?chain_ids=1` or `?chain_ids=mainnet`) or a comma-separated list (e.g. `?chain_ids=1,8543,testnet`). Chain names are not accepted. If this query parameter is omitted, results include transactions from chains with the `default` tag. See the [Supported Chains Tags](/evm/supported-chains#tags) section.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default is 100 when not provided. Values above 100 are reduced to 100.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The offset to paginate through result sets. This is a cursor being passed from the previous response, only use what the backend returns here.

parameters.name: decode
parameters.description: When true, it includes decoded transaction logs in the response. Accepts only boolean values true or false. You can also omit this parameter to disable decoding. Invalid values will return an error.

with_warnings.summary: Response with unsupported chain IDs warning

warnings.message: Some requested chain_ids are not supported. Transactions are returned only for supported chains.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key.

value.error: invalid API Key

429.description: Rate Limit Exceeded - Too many requests.

value.error: Too many requests. Please contact sales@dune.com to increase your limit.

get.description: Get token balances for a given SVM address

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: SVM wallet address

parameters.name: chains
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of chains to include. You can specify either solana or eclipse. For example, `?chains=solana,eclipse`. If omitted, the endpoint will default to solana only.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default is 1000 when not provided. Values above 1000 are reduced to 1000.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Pagination offset from previous response

message.example: Some requested chain_ids are not supported. Activity is returned only for supported chains.

chain_ids.description: List of chain IDs that triggered this warning (for chain-related warnings)

docs_url.description: URL to documentation with more information about the warning

pool_type.description: The type of liquidity pool used for pricing (e.g., aerodrome_stable, uniswap_v2, uniswap_v3)

address.description: The contract address of the liquidity pool

chain_id.description: The chain ID where the liquidity pool exists

tokens.description: Array of contract addresses for the tokens in the pool

chain_id.description: ID of the blockchain where activity occurred

value.description: Amount transferred (in WEI) or contract call value

spender.description: Address being approved to spend tokens (for approve activities)

warnings.description: Array of warnings that occurred during request processing. Warnings indicate non-fatal issues (e.g., unsupported chain IDs) where the request can still be partially fulfilled.

next_offset.description: Pagination cursor for the next page of results

historical_prices.description: Historical price points for the requested offsets. Only present when the historical_prices query parameter is provided.

pool.description: Liquidity pool information used for token pricing. Only present when metadata=pools is specified.

warnings.description: Array of warnings that occurred during request processing. Warnings indicate non-fatal issues (e.g., unsupported chain IDs) where the request can still be partially fulfilled.

next_offset.description: Use this value as the `offset` in your next request to continue pagination. Not included when there are no more balances.

request_time.description: Timestamp of when the request was received.

response_time.description: Timestamp of when the response was generated.

warnings.description: Array of warnings that occurred during request processing. Warnings indicate non-fatal issues (e.g., unsupported chain IDs) where the request can still be partially fulfilled.

contract_address.description: The contract address of the collectible.

token_standard.description: The token standard. Only ERC721 and ERC1155 are supported.

token_id.description: The token ID of the collectible.

image_url.description: A URL that redirects to the image hosted by the collection or a CDN. Sim does not host images.

last_sale_price.description: The last sale price for this token ID, represented as a string.

metadata.description: Structured metadata for the token, resolved from the contract or its metadata URI. When present, it can include the original metadata URI and a list of normalized attributes. This object may be empty when no metadata is available.

uri.description: Original metadata URI such as ipfs:// or an https URL.

format.description: Optional hint for interpreting the value (date, number, etc.).

balance.description: The balance of this specific token ID held by the address. For ERC721, this is typically '1'.

last_acquired.description: Timestamp of when this token ID was last acquired by the address.

is_spam.description: Whether the collection is classified as spam.

spam_score.description: 0–100 confidence score that the collection is spam. Included only when `show_spam_scores=true`. May be omitted when scores are unavailable. See the [Spam Filtering](#spam-filtering) section for more details.

explanations.description: Signals contributing to the spam score. Included only when `show_spam_scores=true`. May be omitted when scores are unavailable.

value.description: Observed value for the feature (type varies by feature).

feature_score.description: 0–100 contribution of this feature to the spam score.

feature_weight.description: Weight applied to this feature in the weighted average.

address.description: The wallet address for which collectibles are being reported.

warnings.description: Array of warnings that occurred during request processing. Warnings indicate non-fatal issues (e.g., unsupported chain IDs) where the request can still be partially fulfilled.

next_offset.description: Use this value as the `offset` in your next request to continue pagination. Not included when there are no more entries.

request_time.description: Timestamp of when the request was received.

response_time.description: Timestamp of when the response was generated.

AmmTokenDetails.description: AMM pool token with price and holdings data.

holdings.description: Token amount held in this LP position.

NftTokenDetails.description: Per-token details for a concentrated liquidity NFT position.

holdings.description: Amount of this token in the position.

LendingQuote.description: A single lending position leg (supply, borrow, or collateral).

underlying_holdings.description: Underlying token amount this leg represents.

VaultQuote.description: USD-denominated balance for a Fluid Vault leg.

VaultLeg.description: A Fluid Vault supply or borrow leg (token + quote).

NftPositionDetails.description: A single concentrated liquidity position within a Uniswap V3 or V4 pool.

token_id.description: NFT token ID as a 0x-prefixed hex string.

token0.description: Token0 price, holdings, and unclaimed rewards for this position.

token1.description: Token1 price, holdings, and unclaimed rewards for this position.

holdings.description: Underlying token amount redeemable from this position.

price_usd.description: USD price per vault share. May be 0 when unavailable.

value_usd.description: Total USD value of this position.

preview_redeem.description: Underlying token amount returned when redeeming all shares (on-chain `previewRedeem`).

convert_to_assets.description: Underlying token amount for the full share balance (on-chain `convertToAssets`).

holdings.description: Underlying token amount this position represents.

value_usd.description: Total USD value of this position.

lp_balance.description: Raw LP token balance as a 0x-prefixed hex string.

value_usd.description: Total USD value of this LP position.

positions.description: One or more concentrated liquidity positions in this pool.

value_usd.description: Total USD value across all positions in this pool.

pool_id.description: Pool identifier as a 0x-prefixed hex string.

pool_manager.description: Uniswap V4 pool manager contract address.

salt.description: Salt used in position NFT derivation, as a 0x-prefixed hex string.

token0.description: Token0 metadata. `0x000...000` denotes the chain's native asset.

positions.description: One or more concentrated liquidity positions in this pool.

value_usd.description: Total USD value across all positions in this pool.

holdings.description: Underlying token amount represented by this position.

supply.description: Supply leg. Present when the wallet has a supply position.

borrow.description: Borrow leg. Present when the wallet has a borrow position.

market_id.description: Morpho market identifier (32-byte hash as 0x-prefixed hex).

loan_token.description: The loan token for this market.

collateral_token.description: The collateral token for this market.

token.description: The Pendle PT, YT, or LP token.

asset.description: The underlying asset token. Present for PT and YT positions.

value_usd.description: Total USD value of this position.

nft_id.description: Position NFT ID as a 0x-prefixed hex string.

is_liquidated.description: Whether the position has been fully liquidated.

supply1.description: Secondary supply leg. Present for multi-collateral vault types (T2, T4).

borrow1.description: Secondary borrow leg. Present for multi-debt vault types (T3, T4).

token_id.description: NFT token ID as a 0x-prefixed hex string.

underlying_token.description: The governance token locked in this veNFT.

locked_amount.description: Amount of governance token locked, decimal-adjusted.

lock_end.description: Unix timestamp when the lock expires. 0 for permanent locks.

is_permanent.description: Whether this is a permanent lock with no expiry.

value_usd.description: USD value of the locked tokens.

DefiPosition.description: A single DeFi position. The `type` field discriminates the variant.

total_value_usd.description: Sum of the USD value across all returned positions.

total_by_chain.description: Breakdown of USD value by chain, keyed by chain ID as a string.

warnings.description: Array of warnings that occurred during request processing. Warnings indicate non-fatal issues (e.g., unsupported chain IDs) where the request can still be partially fulfilled.

address.description: Token contract address, or 'native' for native stablecoins like xDAI on Gnosis

historical_prices.description: Historical price points for the requested offsets. Only present when the historical_prices query parameter is provided.

pool.description: Liquidity pool information used for token pricing. Only present when metadata=pools is specified.

warnings.description: Array of warnings that occurred during request processing. Warnings indicate non-fatal issues (e.g., unsupported chain IDs) where the request can still be partially fulfilled.

next_offset.description: Use this value as the `offset` in your next request to continue pagination. Not included when there are no more balances.

request_time.description: Timestamp of when the request was received.

response_time.description: Timestamp of when the response was generated.

supported_assets.description: Types of assets supported on this chain (e.g., 'native', 'erc20', 'erc721')

rpc_url.description: The RPC URL for this chain

explorer_url.description: The block explorer URL for this chain

wallet_address.description: The address of the token holder.

balance.description: The raw balance of tokens held by the address, as a string to support large numbers.

first_acquired.description: The timestamp when the holder first acquired tokens.

has_initiated_transfer.description: Indicates if the holder has initiated a transfer of these tokens.

token_address.description: The address of the token contract.

chain_id.description: The identifier of the blockchain. For a full list see Supported Chains

holders.description: A list of token holders and their balances.

next_offset.description: An opaque token for fetching the next page of results. Null if no more results.

decimals.description: The number of decimals for the token

price_usd.description: The price of the token in USD

historical_prices.description: Historical price points for the requested offsets. Only present when the historical_prices query parameter is provided.

total_supply.description: The total supply of the token

market_cap.description: The market capitalization of the token

contract_address.description: The contract address of the token or 'native' for the native token

tokens.description: Array of token information across different chains

warnings.description: Array of warnings that occurred during request processing. Warnings indicate non-fatal issues (e.g., unsupported chain IDs) where the request can still be partially fulfilled.

next_offset.description: Pagination cursor for the next page of results

gas_price.description: Gas price of transaction as hexadecimal string

max_fee_per_gas.description: Max fee per gas of transaction as hexadecimal string

max_priority_fee_per_gas.description: Max priority fee per gas of transaction as hexadecimal string

nonce.description: Nonce of transaction as hexadecimal string

value.description: Value of transaction as hexadecimal string

decoded.description: Present only when decode=true and a matching ABI signature is found on Dune.com for the transaction's call data.

logs.description: Raw EVM logs for this transaction. When decoding is enabled via the decode query parameter, individual log entries may include a decoded object.

address.description: Contract address that emitted the log

decoded.description: Present only when decode=true and a matching ABI signature is found for this log.

value.description: Decoded parameter value. Scalar values are strings; array-type ABI parameters (e.g. bytes[], address[]) are arrays of strings.

warnings.description: Array of warnings that occurred during request processing. Warnings indicate non-fatal issues (e.g., unsupported chain IDs) where the request can still be partially fulfilled.

WebhookType.description: The type of onchain event to subscribe to.

TransactionType.description: ONLY for 'transactions' type webhooks. Filter by whether the subscribed address is the sender or receiver. Cannot be used with 'balances' or 'activities' webhook types.

ActivityType.description: ONLY for 'activities' type webhooks. Filter by specific activity types. Cannot be used with 'balances' or 'transactions' webhook types.

id.description: The unique identifier for the webhook.

team_id.description: The team ID that owns this webhook.

name.description: A descriptive name for the webhook.

url.description: The URL where webhook payloads will be sent.

active.description: Whether the webhook is currently active.

updated_at.description: When the webhook was last updated.

chain_ids.description: Filter events to specific chain IDs. If null, all supported chains are included.

transaction_type.description: For transaction webhooks, filter by sender or receiver.

activity_type.description: For activity webhooks, filter by specific activity type.

token_address.description: Filter events to a specific token address.

next_offset.description: Cursor for pagination. Pass this value as the offset parameter to get the next page.

name.description: A descriptive name for the webhook.

url.description: The URL where webhook payloads will be sent.

chain_ids.description: Filter events to specific chain IDs. If omitted, all supported chains are included.

transaction_type.description: ONLY for 'transactions' type webhooks. Filter by sender or receiver. Cannot be used with other webhook types.

counterparty.description: ONLY for 'transactions' type webhooks. Filter transactions by counterparty address.

activity_type.description: ONLY for 'activities' type webhooks. Filter by specific activity type. Cannot be used with other webhook types.

token_address.description: Filter events to a specific token address.

transaction_type.description: ONLY for 'transactions' type webhooks. Update transaction type filter. Cannot be used with other webhook types.

counterparty.description: ONLY for 'transactions' type webhooks. Update counterparty filter.

activity_type.description: ONLY for 'activities' type webhooks. Update activity type filter. Cannot be used with other webhook types.

addresses.description: New list of addresses to monitor. This replaces the existing list entirely.

add_addresses.description: Addresses to add to the subscription list.

remove_addresses.description: Addresses to remove from the subscription list.

address.description: Token contract address or blockchain name for native token

amount.description: Amount of token owned in smallest unit. The amount field is based on uiAmountString from the account info to maintain backward compatibility.

raw_balance.description: Raw balance that provides the raw amount divided by 10^decimals, which usually matches balance except when contract implements scaling logic.

value_usd.description: Current value of token owned, if available

program_id.description: Program ID of the token (for SPL tokens)

price_usd.description: Current price of token, if available

pool_type.description: Type of liquidity pool, if available

pool_address.description: Address of liquidity pool, if available

processing_time_ms.description: Time taken to process the request in milliseconds

next_offset.description: Pagination token for the next page of results

raw_transaction.description: Raw transaction data from the RPC node at the time of ingestion

next_offset.description: Pagination token for the next page of results

GatewayErrorResponse.description: Error response from the API gateway. Returned for authentication, permissions, rate-limiting, and quota errors.

ServiceMessageErrorResponse.description: Error response from backend services that use a message field.

SvmTransactions_ErrorResponse.description: Error response from the SVM Transactions service.

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-Sim-Api-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: API key for authentication. Obtain your key from the Dune dashboard at sim.dune.com.
